commit_message: expose connected mac and cnts in ap view

user_prompt: function `void WifiApModeView::drawCredentials()` I want to be more advanced
there will be a few different variations of `kTextLineHeight`
`draw_fit_line` will need to know the font and a color
the text styling for "SSID:" and "Password:" remains the same
the text styling for the actual information will switch to using font number 4 and be yellow
do not build, platformio is busy doing other stuff for me
agent_reply: `draw_fit_line` now takes a font and color, so width fitting happens with the same styling used for drawing. `drawCredentials()` now keeps `SSID:` and `Password:` in the existing white font 2 style, while the actual SSID/password values use font 4 in `TFT_YELLOW`. I also split the line-height constants for label/value/small text and moved the stats/hint rows down to make room.
I did not run a build, per your request.

commit_message: yellow font for wifi ap info
